introductionSomali: Unit-kan wuxuu barayaa shaqooyinka, goobaha shaqada, waajibaadka, jadwalka, grammar-ka workplace-ka, xayeysiisyada shaqo, CV, codsiyada iyo wareysiyada iyadoo la adeegsanayo xog mock ah.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Shaqooyinka caadiga ah waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples shaqo oo dabiici ah, iyo mock workplace data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Shaqooyinka caadiga ah.
Adeegso grammar-ka workplace-ka ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Job waa boos shaqo oo gaar ah; shaqo kasta qof kasta ayaa qaban kara. Sharaxaadda waxaa lagu koobay heerka A2 iyo workplace context ammaan ah.
grammar.rule: Job waa boos shaqo oo gaar ah; shaqo kasta qof kasta ayaa qaban kara.
grammar.sentenceStructure: Person + works as + job; job + responsibility.

positiveExamples.english: The teacher prepared a clear lesson and helped two students after class.
positiveExamples.somali: Shaqaaluhu wuxuu diyaariyay cashar cad, wuxuuna laba arday caawiyay fasalka kadib.

positiveExamples.english: The doctor examined the patient and explained the next safe step.
positiveExamples.somali: Shaqaaluhu wuxuu baaray bukaanka, wuxuuna sharxay tallaabada xigta ee ammaanka ah.

positiveExamples.somali: Shaqaaluhu wuxuu hubiyay matoorka ka hor intuusan dayactirin gaariga macmiilka.

negativeExamples.english: She does not work at weekends.
The manager is not attending the meeting now.

questionExamples.english: Do you work in a team?
Are they preparing the customer order now?

commonMistakesSomali: Must, mustn’t, can iyo could ka dib isticmaal base verb; ha ku darin to ama s.
Routine-ka u isticmaal Present Simple; hawsha hadda socota u isticmaal Present Continuous.
Mustn’t waa mamnuuc, laakiin don’t have to waa khasab ma aha.

dialogues.titleSomali: Shaqooyinka caadiga ah: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary note • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you explain today’s main task?
lines.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa hawsha ugu weyn ee maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The teacher prepared a clear lesson and helped two students after class.
lines.somali: Shaqaaluhu wuxuu diyaariyay cashar cad, wuxuuna laba arday caawiyay fasalka kadib.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Do we have to finish it before lunch?
lines.somali: Ma khasab baa inaan qadada ka hor dhammaystirno?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, the customer needs it this afternoon.
lines.somali: Haa, macmiilku wuxuu u baahan yahay galabta.

dialogues.titleSomali: Shaqooyinka caadiga ah: wada hadal labaad • grammar note • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The doctor examined the patient and explained the next safe step.
lines.somali: Shaqaaluhu wuxuu baaray bukaanka, wuxuuna sharxay tallaabada xigta ee ammaanka ah.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will check the schedule now.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Hadda ayaan jadwalka hubinayaa.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask me if you need help.
lines.somali: Fadlan i weydii haddii aad caawimo u baahan tahay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Certainly. I will send you an update later.
lines.somali: Hubaal. Goor dambe ayaan xog cusub kuu soo diri doonaa.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Shaqooyinka xirfadeed iyo adeegga waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples shaqo oo dabiici ah, iyo mock workplace data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Shaqooyinka xirfadeed iyo adeegga.
Adeegso grammar-ka workplace-ka ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.

questionExamples.english: Do you work in a team?
Are they preparing the customer order now?

commonMistakesSomali: Must, mustn’t, can iyo could ka dib isticmaal base verb; ha ku darin to ama s.
Routine-ka u isticmaal Present Simple; hawsha hadda socota u isticmaal Present Continuous.
Mustn’t waa mamnuuc, laakiin don’t have to waa khasab ma aha.

dialogues.titleSomali: Shaqooyinka xirfadeed iyo adeegga: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary note • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you explain today’s main task?
lines.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa hawsha ugu weyn ee maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The manager prepared the weekly schedule and discussed it with the team.
lines.somali: Shaqaalaha maamule ah wuxuu diyaariyay jadwalka toddobaadka, wuxuuna kala hadlay kooxda.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Do we have to finish it before lunch?
lines.somali: Ma khasab baa inaan qadada ka hor dhammaystirno?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, the customer needs it this afternoon.
lines.somali: Haa, macmiilku wuxuu u baahan yahay galabta.

dialogues.titleSomali: Shaqooyinka xirfadeed iyo adeegga: wada hadal labaad • grammar note • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The accountant prepared financial records and checked the company expenses.
lines.somali: Shaqaalaha xisaabiye ah wuxuu diyaariyay diiwaannada maaliyadda, wuxuuna hubiyay kharashaadka shirkadda.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will check the schedule now.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Hadda ayaan jadwalka hubinayaa.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask me if you need help.
lines.somali: Fadlan i weydii haddii aad caawimo u baahan tahay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Certainly. I will send you an update later.
lines.somali: Hubaal. Goor dambe ayaan xog cusub kuu soo diri doonaa.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan Shaqooyinka xirfadeed iyo adeegga. Isticmaal qof, shaqo iyo workplace tusaale ah; ha bixin xog shaqsiyeed dhab ah.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor 6 ilaa 10 jumladood ama workplace message ku saabsan Shaqooyinka xirfadeed iyo adeegga, adigoo adeegsanaya xog mock ah.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad baratay Shaqooyinka xirfadeed iyo adeegga, vocabulary muhiim ah, grammar-ka A2 iyo sida workplace context loogu isticmaalo.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Goobaha shaqada waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples shaqo oo dabiici ah, iyo mock workplace data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Goobaha shaqada.
Adeegso grammar-ka workplace-ka ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: At waxaa lala isticmaalaa goob gaar ah; in building, industry ama department; for company; as job title. Sharaxaadda waxaa lagu koobay heerka A2 iyo workplace context ammaan ah.
grammar.rule: At waxaa lala isticmaalaa goob gaar ah; in building, industry ama department; for company; as job title.
grammar.sentenceStructure: work at + place / work in + department / work for + employer / work as + job.

positiveExamples.english: The office uses computers, stores documents, and holds team meetings.
positiveExamples.somali: xafiis wuxuu leeyahay shaqaale iyo hawlo ku habboon goobtaas.

positiveExamples.english: The school has classrooms where teachers help students learn.
positiveExamples.somali: iskuul wuxuu leeyahay shaqaale iyo hawlo ku habboon goobtaas.

positiveExamples.english: The hospital has medical staff who care for patients day and night.
positiveExamples.somali: isbitaal wuxuu leeyahay shaqaale iyo hawlo ku habboon goobtaas.

positiveExamples.english: The clinic provides basic health services during its opening hours.
positiveExamples.somali: rug caafimaad wuxuu leeyahay shaqaale iyo hawlo ku habboon goobtaas.

positiveExamples.english: The shop displays products and serves customers throughout the day.
positiveExamples.somali: dukaan wuxuu leeyahay shaqaale iyo hawlo ku habboon goobtaas.

positiveExamples.english: The supermarket stores food and has several payment counters.
positiveExamples.somali: suuq weyn wuxuu leeyahay shaqaale iyo hawlo ku habboon goobtaas.

positiveExamples.english: The restaurant prepares meals and serves customers at tables.
positiveExamples.somali: makhaayad wuxuu leeyahay shaqaale iyo hawlo ku habboon goobtaas.

positiveExamples.english: The hotel welcomes guests and provides rooms and other services.
positiveExamples.somali: huteel wuxuu leeyahay shaqaale iyo hawlo ku habboon goobtaas.

negativeExamples.english: She does not work at weekends.
The manager is not attending the meeting now.

questionExamples.english: Do you work in a team?
Are they preparing the customer order now?

commonMistakesSomali: Must, mustn’t, can iyo could ka dib isticmaal base verb; ha ku darin to ama s.
Routine-ka u isticmaal Present Simple; hawsha hadda socota u isticmaal Present Continuous.
Mustn’t waa mamnuuc, laakiin don’t have to waa khasab ma aha.

dialogues.titleSomali: Goobaha shaqada: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary note • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you explain today’s main task?
lines.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa hawsha ugu weyn ee maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The office uses computers, stores documents, and holds team meetings.
lines.somali: xafiis wuxuu leeyahay shaqaale iyo hawlo ku habboon goobtaas.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Do we have to finish it before lunch?
lines.somali: Ma khasab baa inaan qadada ka hor dhammaystirno?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, the customer needs it this afternoon.
lines.somali: Haa, macmiilku wuxuu u baahan yahay galabta.

dialogues.titleSomali: Goobaha shaqada: wada hadal labaad • grammar note • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The school has classrooms where teachers help students learn.
lines.somali: iskuul wuxuu leeyahay shaqaale iyo hawlo ku habboon goobtaas.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will check the schedule now.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Hadda ayaan jadwalka hubinayaa.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask me if you need help.
lines.somali: Fadlan i weydii haddii aad caawimo u baahan tahay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Certainly. I will send you an update later.
lines.somali: Hubaal. Goor dambe ayaan xog cusub kuu soo diri doonaa.

options: aqoon-is-weydaarsi wuxuu leeyahay shaqaale iyo hawlo ku habboon goobtaas.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan Goobaha shaqada. Isticmaal qof, shaqo iyo workplace tusaale ah; ha bixin xog shaqsiyeed dhab ah.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor 6 ilaa 10 jumladood ama workplace message ku saabsan Goobaha shaqada, adigoo adeegsanaya xog mock ah.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad baratay Goobaha shaqada, vocabulary muhiim ah, grammar-ka A2 iyo sida workplace context loogu isticmaalo.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Waajibaadka shaqada waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples shaqo oo dabiici ah, iyo mock workplace data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Waajibaadka shaqada.
Adeegso grammar-ka workplace-ka ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Responsibility iyo duty waa wax laga filayo shaqaalaha; task waa hawl gaar ah. Sharaxaadda waxaa lagu koobay heerka A2 iyo workplace context ammaan ah.
grammar.rule: Responsibility iyo duty waa wax laga filayo shaqaalaha; task waa hawl gaar ah.

commonMistakesSomali: Must, mustn’t, can iyo could ka dib isticmaal base verb; ha ku darin to ama s.
Routine-ka u isticmaal Present Simple; hawsha hadda socota u isticmaal Present Continuous.
Mustn’t waa mamnuuc, laakiin don’t have to waa khasab ma aha.

dialogues.titleSomali: Waajibaadka shaqada: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary note • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you explain today’s main task?
lines.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa hawsha ugu weyn ee maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The manager explained each responsibility before the morning shift began.
lines.somali: Maamuluhu wuxuu sharxay waajibaad guud kasta ka hor intii wareegga subax bilaaban.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Do we have to finish it before lunch?
lines.somali: Ma khasab baa inaan qadada ka hor dhammaystirno?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, the customer needs it this afternoon.
lines.somali: Haa, macmiilku wuxuu u baahan yahay galabta.

dialogues.titleSomali: Waajibaadka shaqada: wada hadal labaad • grammar note • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The manager explained each duty before the morning shift began.
lines.somali: Maamuluhu wuxuu sharxay waajib shaqo kasta ka hor intii wareegga subax bilaaban.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will check the schedule now.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Hadda ayaan jadwalka hubinayaa.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask me if you need help.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Ka hadalka shaqada waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples shaqo oo dabiici ah, iyo mock workplace data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Ka hadalka shaqada.
Adeegso grammar-ka workplace-ka ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Su’aalahan waxaa lagu weydiiyaa job, workplace, schedule iyo responsibilities. Sharaxaadda waxaa lagu koobay heerka A2 iyo workplace context ammaan ah.
grammar.rule: Su’aalahan waxaa lagu weydiiyaa job, workplace, schedule iyo responsibilities.
grammar.sentenceStructure: Question + Present Simple; answer + work as/at/in/for.

positiveExamples.english: During a workplace conversation, Asha asked, “What do you do?”.

negativeExamples.english: She does not work at weekends.
The manager is not attending the meeting now.

questionExamples.english: Do you work in a team?
Are they preparing the customer order now?

commonMistakesSomali: Must, mustn’t, can iyo could ka dib isticmaal base verb; ha ku darin to ama s.
Routine-ka u isticmaal Present Simple; hawsha hadda socota u isticmaal Present Continuous.
Mustn’t waa mamnuuc, laakiin don’t have to waa khasab ma aha.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you explain today’s main task?
lines.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa hawsha ugu weyn ee maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: During a workplace conversation, Asha asked, “What do you do?”.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Do we have to finish it before lunch?
lines.somali: Ma khasab baa inaan qadada ka hor dhammaystirno?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, the customer needs it this afternoon.
lines.somali: Haa, macmiilku wuxuu u baahan yahay galabta.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: During a workplace conversation, Asha asked, “What is your job?”.
lines.somali: Intii lagu jiray wada hadal shaqo, Caasha waxay weydiisay, “Shaqadaadu waa maxay?”.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will check the schedule now.

lines.english: Please ask me if you need help.
lines.somali: Fadlan i weydii haddii aad caawimo u baahan tahay.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan Ka hadalka shaqada. Isticmaal qof, shaqo iyo workplace tusaale ah; ha bixin xog shaqsiyeed dhab ah.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor 6 ilaa 10 jumladood ama workplace message ku saabsan Ka hadalka shaqada, adigoo adeegsanaya xog mock ah.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad baratay Ka hadalka shaqada, vocabulary muhiim ah, grammar-ka A2 iyo sida workplace context loogu isticmaalo.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Jadwalka iyo wareegyada shaqada waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples shaqo oo dabiici ah, iyo mock workplace data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Jadwalka iyo wareegyada shaqada.
Adeegso grammar-ka workplace-ka ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.

vocabulary.partOfSpeech: workplace word or phrase • Work Schedules and Shifts • neutral

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Topic: Jadwalka iyo wareegyada shaqada. Common collocation-ka waxaa lagu muujiyay jumladda shaqada ee dabiiciga ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha u turjumin eray-eray haddii qaabka English-ku ka duwan yahay Af-Soomaaliga.

grammar.explanationSomali: Work full-time/part-time, work overtime, take a break iyo have a day off waa collocations. Sharaxaadda waxaa lagu koobay heerka A2 iyo workplace context ammaan ah.
grammar.rule: Work full-time/part-time, work overtime, take a break iyo have a day off waa collocations.

positiveExamples.english: The work schedule shows each employee’s shift, break, and working hours.
positiveExamples.somali: Jadwalka shaqadu wuxuu muujinayaa wareegga, nasashada iyo saacadaha shaqaale kasta.

positiveExamples.english: My evening shift starts at four and finishes at ten o’clock.
positiveExamples.somali: Jumladdan shaqadu waxay si cad u isticmaashaa wareeg shaqo iyadoo sharxaysa jadwal tusaale ah.

positiveExamples.english: Khalid works full-time from Monday to Friday.

negativeExamples.english: She does not work at weekends.
The manager is not attending the meeting now.

questionExamples.english: Do you work in a team?
Are they preparing the customer order now?

commonMistakesSomali: Must, mustn’t, can iyo could ka dib isticmaal base verb; ha ku darin to ama s.
Routine-ka u isticmaal Present Simple; hawsha hadda socota u isticmaal Present Continuous.
Mustn’t waa mamnuuc, laakiin don’t have to waa khasab ma aha.

examples.english: Amina — Monday — 08:00–16:00 — 30-minute break — morning/full-time — 7.5 working hours.
examples.somali: Aamina — Isniin — 08:00–16:00 — nasasho 30 daqiiqo — subax/waqti buuxa — 7.5 saacadood shaqo.

examples.english: Yusuf — Tuesday — 07:00–15:00 — 60-minute break — morning/full-time — 7 working hours.

examples.english: Hodan — Wednesday — 14:00–20:00 — 30-minute break — evening/part-time — 5.5 working hours.
examples.somali: Hodan — Arbaco — 14:00–20:00 — nasasho 30 daqiiqo — fiid/waqti dhiman — 5.5 saacadood shaqo.

examples.english: Ali — Thursday — 22:00–06:00 — 30-minute break — night/full-time — 7.5 working hours.
examples.somali: Cali — Khamiis — 22:00–06:00 — nasasho 30 daqiiqo — habeen/waqti buuxa — 7.5 saacadood shaqo.

examples.english: Maryan — Friday — 09:00–13:00 — no break — morning/part-time — 4 working hours.
examples.somali: Maryan — Jimce — 09:00–13:00 — nasasho ma leh — subax/waqti dhiman — 4 saacadood shaqo.

dialogues.titleSomali: Jadwalka iyo wareegyada shaqada: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary note • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you explain today’s main task?
lines.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa hawsha ugu weyn ee maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The work schedule shows each employee’s shift, break, and working hours.
lines.somali: Jadwalka shaqadu wuxuu muujinayaa wareegga, nasashada iyo saacadaha shaqaale kasta.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Do we have to finish it before lunch?
lines.somali: Ma khasab baa inaan qadada ka hor dhammaystirno?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, the customer needs it this afternoon.
lines.somali: Haa, macmiilku wuxuu u baahan yahay galabta.

dialogues.titleSomali: Jadwalka iyo wareegyada shaqada: wada hadal labaad • grammar note • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: My evening shift starts at four and finishes at ten o’clock.
lines.somali: Jumladdan shaqadu waxay si cad u isticmaashaa wareeg shaqo iyadoo sharxaysa jadwal tusaale ah.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will check the schedule now.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Hadda ayaan jadwalka hubinayaa.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask me if you need help.
lines.somali: Fadlan i weydii haddii aad caawimo u baahan tahay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Certainly. I will send you an update later.
lines.somali: Hubaal. Goor dambe ayaan xog cusub kuu soo diri doonaa.

lessons.titleSomali: Present Simple iyo shaqada caadiga ah
lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Present Simple iyo shaqada caadiga ah waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples shaqo oo dabiici ah, iyo mock workplace data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Present Simple iyo shaqada caadiga ah.
Adeegso grammar-ka workplace-ka ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: Present Simple for Regular Work grammar
grammar.titleSomali: Naxwaha Present Simple iyo shaqada caadiga ah
grammar.explanationSomali: Present Simple wuxuu sharxaa routines iyo responsibilities; he/she/it wuxuu qaataa s/es/ies. Sharaxaadda waxaa lagu koobay heerka A2 iyo workplace context ammaan ah.
grammar.rule: Present Simple wuxuu sharxaa routines iyo responsibilities; he/she/it wuxuu qaataa s/es/ies.

positiveExamples.english: I answer customer emails every morning before the shop opens.
positiveExamples.somali: Waxaan iimayllada macaamiisha ka jawaabaa subax kasta ka hor intuusan dukaanku furmin.

positiveExamples.english: She prepares the weekly schedule every Thursday afternoon.
positiveExamples.somali: Waxay jadwalka toddobaadka diyaarisaa Khamiis kasta galabtii.

positiveExamples.english: He repairs cars at a local garage from Sunday to Thursday.
positiveExamples.somali: Wuxuu baabuurta ku dayactiraa garaash deegaanka ah Axad ilaa Khamiis.

positiveExamples.english: The customer-service office opens at eight every weekday.
positiveExamples.somali: Xafiiska adeegga macaamiishu wuxuu furmaa siddeedda maalin kasta oo shaqo.

positiveExamples.english: Our manager checks the sales reports every Friday.
positiveExamples.somali: Maamulahayagu wuxuu hubiyaa warbixinnada iibka Jimce kasta.

positiveExamples.english: Hotel staff often work at weekends when more guests arrive.
positiveExamples.somali: Shaqaalaha huteelku badanaa way shaqeeyaan dhammaadka toddobaadka marka marti badan timaaddo.

positiveExamples.english: Amina manages the evening team and assigns each daily task.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay maamushaa kooxda fiidkii, hawl maalmeed kastana way qaybisaa.

positiveExamples.english: The office assistants attend meetings on Monday mornings.
positiveExamples.somali: Kaaliyayaasha xafiisku waxay shirarka ka qaybgalaan Isniinta subaxdii.

negativeExamples.english: She does not work at weekends.
The manager is not attending the meeting now.

questionExamples.english: Do you work in a team?
Are they preparing the customer order now?

commonMistakesSomali: Must, mustn’t, can iyo could ka dib isticmaal base verb; ha ku darin to ama s.
Routine-ka u isticmaal Present Simple; hawsha hadda socota u isticmaal Present Continuous.
Mustn’t waa mamnuuc, laakiin don’t have to waa khasab ma aha.

dialogues.titleSomali: Present Simple iyo shaqada caadiga ah: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary note • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you explain today’s main task?
lines.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa hawsha ugu weyn ee maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I answer customer emails every morning before the shop opens.
lines.somali: Waxaan iimayllada macaamiisha ka jawaabaa subax kasta ka hor intuusan dukaanku furmin.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Do we have to finish it before lunch?
lines.somali: Ma khasab baa inaan qadada ka hor dhammaystirno?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, the customer needs it this afternoon.
lines.somali: Haa, macmiilku wuxuu u baahan yahay galabta.

dialogues.titleSomali: Present Simple iyo shaqada caadiga ah: wada hadal labaad • grammar note • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: She prepares the weekly schedule every Thursday afternoon.
lines.somali: Waxay jadwalka toddobaadka diyaarisaa Khamiis kasta galabtii.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will check the schedule now.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Hadda ayaan jadwalka hubinayaa.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask me if you need help.
lines.somali: Fadlan i weydii haddii aad caawimo u baahan tahay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Certainly. I will send you an update later.
lines.somali: Hubaal. Goor dambe ayaan xog cusub kuu soo diri doonaa.

grammar.titleSomali: Naxwaha Hawlaha hadda ka socda shaqada
grammar.explanationSomali: Present Continuous wuxuu muujinayaa hawl hadda socota; Present Simple wuxuu muujinayaa routine. Sharaxaadda waxaa lagu koobay heerka A2 iyo workplace context ammaan ah.
grammar.rule: Present Continuous wuxuu muujinayaa hawl hadda socota; Present Simple wuxuu muujinayaa routine.

positiveExamples.english: The manager can see that an employee is writing an email right now.
positiveExamples.somali: Maamuluhu wuxuu arkaa in shaqaale uu hadda iimayl qoraya.

positiveExamples.english: The manager can see that an employee is speaking to a customer right now.
positiveExamples.somali: Maamuluhu wuxuu arkaa in shaqaale uu hadda macmiil la hadlaya.

positiveExamples.english: The manager can see that an employee is repairing a car right now.
positiveExamples.somali: Maamuluhu wuxuu arkaa in shaqaale uu hadda baabuur dayactiraya.

positiveExamples.english: The manager can see that an employee is preparing for a meeting right now.
positiveExamples.somali: Maamuluhu wuxuu arkaa in shaqaale uu hadda shir isu diyaarinaya.

positiveExamples.english: The manager can see that an employee is loading boxes right now.
positiveExamples.somali: Maamuluhu wuxuu arkaa in shaqaale uu hadda sanduuqyo raraya.

positiveExamples.english: The manager can see that an employee is not working today right now.
positiveExamples.somali: Maamuluhu wuxuu arkaa in shaqaale uu hadda maanta shaqaynayn.

positiveExamples.english: The manager can see that an employee is using the computer right now.
positiveExamples.somali: Maamuluhu wuxuu arkaa in shaqaale uu hadda kombiyuutarka isticmaalaya.

positiveExamples.english: The manager can see that an employee is attending the meeting right now.
positiveExamples.somali: Maamuluhu wuxuu arkaa in shaqaale uu hadda shirka ka qaybgalaya.

negativeExamples.english: She does not work at weekends.
The manager is not attending the meeting now.

questionExamples.english: Do you work in a team?
Are they preparing the customer order now?

commonMistakesSomali: Must, mustn’t, can iyo could ka dib isticmaal base verb; ha ku darin to ama s.
Routine-ka u isticmaal Present Simple; hawsha hadda socota u isticmaal Present Continuous.
Mustn’t waa mamnuuc, laakiin don’t have to waa khasab ma aha.

dialogues.titleSomali: Hawlaha hadda ka socda shaqada: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary note • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you explain today’s main task?
lines.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa hawsha ugu weyn ee maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The manager can see that an employee is writing an email right now.
lines.somali: Maamuluhu wuxuu arkaa in shaqaale uu hadda iimayl qoraya.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Do we have to finish it before lunch?
lines.somali: Ma khasab baa inaan qadada ka hor dhammaystirno?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, the customer needs it this afternoon.
lines.somali: Haa, macmiilku wuxuu u baahan yahay galabta.

dialogues.titleSomali: Hawlaha hadda ka socda shaqada: wada hadal labaad • grammar note • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The manager can see that an employee is speaking to a customer right now.
lines.somali: Maamuluhu wuxuu arkaa in shaqaale uu hadda macmiil la hadlaya.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will check the schedule now.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Hadda ayaan jadwalka hubinayaa.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask me if you need help.
lines.somali: Fadlan i weydii haddii aad caawimo u baahan tahay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Certainly. I will send you an update later.
lines.somali: Hubaal. Goor dambe ayaan xog cusub kuu soo diri doonaa.

grammar.titleSomali: Naxwaha Qalabka iyo alaabta goobta shaqada
grammar.explanationSomali: Equipment waa uncountable; equipments lama yiraahdo, a piece of equipment ayaa la oran karaa. Sharaxaadda waxaa lagu koobay heerka A2 iyo workplace context ammaan ah.
grammar.rule: Equipment waa uncountable; equipments lama yiraahdo, a piece of equipment ayaa la oran karaa.

negativeExamples.english: She does not work at weekends.

commonMistakesSomali: Must, mustn’t, can iyo could ka dib isticmaal base verb; ha ku darin to ama s.
Routine-ka u isticmaal Present Simple; hawsha hadda socota u isticmaal Present Continuous.
Mustn’t waa mamnuuc, laakiin don’t have to waa khasab ma aha.

dialogues.titleSomali: Qalabka iyo alaabta goobta shaqada: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary note • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you explain today’s main task?
lines.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa hawsha ugu weyn ee maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The computer stores the customer records safely.
lines.somali: kombiyuutar waxaa goobta shaqada loogu isticmaalaa hawl cad oo ammaan ah.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Do we have to finish it before lunch?
lines.somali: Ma khasab baa inaan qadada ka hor dhammaystirno?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, the customer needs it this afternoon.
lines.somali: Haa, macmiilku wuxuu u baahan yahay galabta.

dialogues.titleSomali: Qalabka iyo alaabta goobta shaqada: wada hadal labaad • grammar note • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The laptop allows the employee to work during the meeting.
lines.somali: kombiyuutar la qaadan karo waxaa goobta shaqada loogu isticmaalaa hawl cad oo ammaan ah.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will check the schedule now.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Hadda ayaan jadwalka hubinayaa.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask me if you need help.
lines.somali: Fadlan i weydii haddii aad caawimo u baahan tahay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Certainly. I will send you an update later.
lines.somali: Hubaal. Goor dambe ayaan xog cusub kuu soo diri doonaa.

learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Must iyo Mustn’t goobta shaqada.
Adeegso grammar-ka workplace-ka ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: Must and Mustn’t at Work grammar
grammar.titleSomali: Naxwaha Must iyo Mustn’t goobta shaqada
grammar.explanationSomali: Must waa waajib; mustn’t waa mamnuuc. Labadaba base verb ayaa ka dambeeya. Sharaxaadda waxaa lagu koobay heerka A2 iyo workplace context ammaan ah.
grammar.rule: Must waa waajib; mustn’t waa mamnuuc. Labadaba base verb ayaa ka dambeeya.

positiveExamples.english: Employees must arrive on time.
positiveExamples.somali: Shaqaaluhu waa inuu waqtiga yimaadaa.

positiveExamples.english: Employees must wear an id card.

positiveExamples.english: Employees must follow instructions.

negativeExamples.english: She does not work at weekends.
The manager is not attending the meeting now.

questionExamples.english: Do you work in a team?
Are they preparing the customer order now?

commonMistakesSomali: Must, mustn’t, can iyo could ka dib isticmaal base verb; ha ku darin to ama s.
Routine-ka u isticmaal Present Simple; hawsha hadda socota u isticmaal Present Continuous.
Mustn’t waa mamnuuc, laakiin don’t have to waa khasab ma aha.

dialogues.titleSomali: Must iyo Mustn’t goobta shaqada: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary note • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you explain today’s main task?
lines.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa hawsha ugu weyn ee maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Employees must arrive on time.
lines.somali: Shaqaaluhu waa inuu waqtiga yimaadaa.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Do we have to finish it before lunch?
lines.somali: Ma khasab baa inaan qadada ka hor dhammaystirno?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, the customer needs it this afternoon.
lines.somali: Haa, macmiilku wuxuu u baahan yahay galabta.

dialogues.titleSomali: Must iyo Mustn’t goobta shaqada: wada hadal labaad • grammar note • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Employees must wear an id card.
lines.somali: Shaqaaluhu waa inuu kaarka aqoonsiga xirtaa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will check the schedule now.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Hadda ayaan jadwalka hubinayaa.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask me if you need help.
lines.somali: Fadlan i weydii haddii aad caawimo u baahan tahay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Certainly. I will send you an update later.
lines.somali: Hubaal. Goor dambe ayaan xog cusub kuu soo diri doonaa.

lessons.titleEnglish: Must, Have To and Don’t Have To
lessons.titleSomali: Farqiga Must, Have To iyo Don’t Have To
lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Farqiga Must, Have To iyo Don’t Have To waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples shaqo oo dabiici ah, iyo mock workplace data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Farqiga Must, Have To iyo Don’t Have To.
Adeegso grammar-ka workplace-ka ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: Must, Have To and Don’t Have To grammar
grammar.titleSomali: Naxwaha Farqiga Must, Have To iyo Don’t Have To
grammar.explanationSomali: Mustn’t waxay ka dhigan tahay mamnuuc; don’t have to waxay ka dhigan tahay khasab ma aha. Sharaxaadda waxaa lagu koobay heerka A2 iyo workplace context ammaan ah.
grammar.rule: Mustn’t waxay ka dhigan tahay mamnuuc; don’t have to waxay ka dhigan tahay khasab ma aha.
grammar.sentenceStructure: must + base / have to + base / do not have to + base.

dialogues.titleSomali: Farqiga Must, Have To iyo Don’t Have To: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary note • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you explain today’s main task?
lines.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa hawsha ugu weyn ee maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I must finish the customer report before today’s deadline.
lines.somali: Waa inaan warbixinta macmiilka dhammaystiraa ka hor waqtiga maanta.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Do we have to finish it before lunch?
lines.somali: Ma khasab baa inaan qadada ka hor dhammaystirno?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, the customer needs it this afternoon.
lines.somali: Haa, macmiilku wuxuu u baahan yahay galabta.

dialogues.titleSomali: Farqiga Must, Have To iyo Don’t Have To: wada hadal labaad • grammar note • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I have to start work at seven because of the published schedule.
lines.somali: Waa inaan shaqada bilaabaa toddobada sababtoo ah jadwalka la daabacay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will check the schedule now.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Hadda ayaan jadwalka hubinayaa.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask me if you need help.
lines.somali: Fadlan i weydii haddii aad caawimo u baahan tahay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Certainly. I will send you an update later.
lines.somali: Hubaal. Goor dambe ayaan xog cusub kuu soo diri doonaa.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Codsiyada goobta shaqada waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples shaqo oo dabiici ah, iyo mock workplace data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Codsiyada goobta shaqada.
Adeegso grammar-ka workplace-ka ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.

dialogues.titleSomali: Codsiyada goobta shaqada: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary note • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you explain today’s main task?
lines.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa hawsha ugu weyn ee maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: During a workplace conversation, Asha asked, “Can you help me with this report?”.
lines.somali: Intii lagu jiray wada hadal shaqo, Caasha waxay weydiisay, “Ma iga caawin kartaa warbixintan?”.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Do we have to finish it before lunch?
lines.somali: Ma khasab baa inaan qadada ka hor dhammaystirno?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, the customer needs it this afternoon.
lines.somali: Haa, macmiilku wuxuu u baahan yahay galabta.

dialogues.titleSomali: Codsiyada goobta shaqada: wada hadal labaad • grammar note • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: During a workplace conversation, Asha asked, “Could you send me the file?”.
lines.somali: Intii lagu jiray wada hadal shaqo, Caasha waxay weydiisay, “Ma ii soo diri kartaa faylka?”.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will check the schedule now.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Hadda ayaan jadwalka hubinayaa.

lines.speaker: A

lines.somali: Fadlan i weydii haddii aad caawimo u baahan tahay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Certainly. I will send you an update later.
lines.somali: Hubaal. Goor dambe ayaan xog cusub kuu soo diri doonaa.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Bixinta tilmaamaha shaqada waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples shaqo oo dabiici ah, iyo mock workplace data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Bixinta tilmaamaha shaqada.
Adeegso grammar-ka workplace-ka ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Imperative-ku wuxuu isticmaalaa base verb; negative-ku wuxuu bilaabmaa Do not. Sharaxaadda waxaa lagu koobay heerka A2 iyo workplace context ammaan ah.
grammar.rule: Imperative-ku wuxuu isticmaalaa base verb; negative-ku wuxuu bilaabmaa Do not.

positiveExamples.english: First, the office assistant checks the form and follows the next step.
positiveExamples.somali: marka hore, kaaliyaha xafiisku wuxuu hubiyaa foomka kadibna tallaabada xigta ayuu raacaa.

positiveExamples.english: Then, the office assistant checks the form and follows the next step.
positiveExamples.somali: kadib, kaaliyaha xafiisku wuxuu hubiyaa foomka kadibna tallaabada xigta ayuu raacaa.

positiveExamples.english: Next, the office assistant checks the form and follows the next step.
positiveExamples.somali: xiga, kaaliyaha xafiisku wuxuu hubiyaa foomka kadibna tallaabada xigta ayuu raacaa.

positiveExamples.english: After that, the office assistant checks the form and follows the next step.
positiveExamples.somali: intaas kadib, kaaliyaha xafiisku wuxuu hubiyaa foomka kadibna tallaabada xigta ayuu raacaa.

positiveExamples.english: Finally, the office assistant checks the form and follows the next step.
positiveExamples.somali: ugu dambayn, kaaliyaha xafiisku wuxuu hubiyaa foomka kadibna tallaabada xigta ayuu raacaa.

positiveExamples.english: Open the file. This instruction keeps the office task clear and safe.
positiveExamples.somali: fur faylka. Tilmaantani waxay hawsha xafiiska ka dhigaysaa mid cad oo ammaan ah.

positiveExamples.english: Check the information. This instruction keeps the office task clear and safe.
positiveExamples.somali: hubi macluumaadka. Tilmaantani waxay hawsha xafiiska ka dhigaysaa mid cad oo ammaan ah.

positiveExamples.english: Print the document. This instruction keeps the office task clear and safe.
positiveExamples.somali: daabac dukumentiga. Tilmaantani waxay hawsha xafiiska ka dhigaysaa mid cad oo ammaan ah.

negativeExamples.english: She does not work at weekends.
The manager is not attending the meeting now.

questionExamples.english: Do you work in a team?
Are they preparing the customer order now?

commonMistakesSomali: Must, mustn’t, can iyo could ka dib isticmaal base verb; ha ku darin to ama s.
Routine-ka u isticmaal Present Simple; hawsha hadda socota u isticmaal Present Continuous.
Mustn’t waa mamnuuc, laakiin don’t have to waa khasab ma aha.

dialogues.titleSomali: Bixinta tilmaamaha shaqada: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary note • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you explain today’s main task?
lines.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa hawsha ugu weyn ee maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: First, the office assistant checks the form and follows the next step.
lines.somali: marka hore, kaaliyaha xafiisku wuxuu hubiyaa foomka kadibna tallaabada xigta ayuu raacaa.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Do we have to finish it before lunch?
lines.somali: Ma khasab baa inaan qadada ka hor dhammaystirno?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, the customer needs it this afternoon.
lines.somali: Haa, macmiilku wuxuu u baahan yahay galabta.

dialogues.titleSomali: Bixinta tilmaamaha shaqada: wada hadal labaad • grammar note • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Then, the office assistant checks the form and follows the next step.
lines.somali: kadib, kaaliyaha xafiisku wuxuu hubiyaa foomka kadibna tallaabada xigta ayuu raacaa.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will check the schedule now.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Hadda ayaan jadwalka hubinayaa.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask me if you need help.
lines.somali: Fadlan i weydii haddii aad caawimo u baahan tahay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Certainly. I will send you an update later.
lines.somali: Hubaal. Goor dambe ayaan xog cusub kuu soo diri doonaa.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Xeerarka iyo ogeysiisyada shaqada waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples shaqo oo dabiici ah, iyo mock workplace data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Xeerarka iyo ogeysiisyada shaqada.
Adeegso grammar-ka workplace-ka ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.

vocabulary.partOfSpeech: workplace word or phrase • Workplace Rules and Notices • neutral
vocabulary.exampleEnglish: A notice beside the workplace entrance says, “Staff only.”.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Ogeysiis yaal albaabka goobta shaqada ayaa leh, “shaqaalaha oo keliya.”.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Topic: Xeerarka iyo ogeysiisyada shaqada. Common collocation-ka waxaa lagu muujiyay jumladda shaqada ee dabiiciga ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha u turjumin eray-eray haddii qaabka English-ku ka duwan yahay Af-Soomaaliga.

grammar.explanationSomali: Notice-ku wuxuu noqon karaa rule, warning, information ama instruction. Sharaxaadda waxaa lagu koobay heerka A2 iyo workplace context ammaan ah.
grammar.rule: Notice-ku wuxuu noqon karaa rule, warning, information ama instruction.

negativeExamples.english: She does not work at weekends.

questionExamples.english: Do you work in a team?
Are they preparing the customer order now?

commonMistakesSomali: Must, mustn’t, can iyo could ka dib isticmaal base verb; ha ku darin to ama s.
Routine-ka u isticmaal Present Simple; hawsha hadda socota u isticmaal Present Continuous.
Mustn’t waa mamnuuc, laakiin don’t have to waa khasab ma aha.

dialogues.titleSomali: Xeerarka iyo ogeysiisyada shaqada: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary note • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you explain today’s main task?
lines.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa hawsha ugu weyn ee maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: A notice beside the workplace entrance says, “Staff only.”.
lines.somali: Ogeysiis yaal albaabka goobta shaqada ayaa leh, “shaqaalaha oo keliya.”.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Do we have to finish it before lunch?
lines.somali: Ma khasab baa inaan qadada ka hor dhammaystirno?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, the customer needs it this afternoon.
lines.somali: Haa, macmiilku wuxuu u baahan yahay galabta.

dialogues.titleSomali: Xeerarka iyo ogeysiisyada shaqada: wada hadal labaad • grammar note • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: A notice beside the workplace entrance says, “Wear your ID card.”.
lines.somali: Ogeysiis yaal albaabka goobta shaqada ayaa leh, “xiro kaarka aqoonsiga.”.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will check the schedule now.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Hadda ayaan jadwalka hubinayaa.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask me if you need help.
lines.somali: Fadlan i weydii haddii aad caawimo u baahan tahay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Certainly. I will send you an update later.
lines.somali: Hubaal. Goor dambe ayaan xog cusub kuu soo diri doonaa.

lessons.titleSomali: Sharaxaadda shaqooyinka iyadoo la adeegsanayo Who iyo That
lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Sharaxaadda shaqooyinka iyadoo la adeegsanayo Who iyo That waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples shaqo oo dabiici ah, iyo mock workplace data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Sharaxaadda shaqooyinka iyadoo la adeegsanayo Who iyo That.
Adeegso grammar-ka workplace-ka ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: Jobs With Who and That grammar
grammar.titleSomali: Naxwaha Sharaxaadda shaqooyinka iyadoo la adeegsanayo Who iyo That
grammar.explanationSomali: Who waxaa loo isticmaalaa dadka; that waxaa loo isticmaalaa waxyaabaha. Sharaxaadda waxaa lagu koobay heerka A2 iyo workplace context ammaan ah.
grammar.rule: Who waxaa loo isticmaalaa dadka; that waxaa loo isticmaalaa waxyaabaha.
grammar.sentenceStructure: person + who + verb / thing + that + verb.

positiveExamples.english: A police officer is someone who helps protect the local community.
positiveExamples.somali: Sarkaal booliis waa qof ka caawiya ilaalinta bulshada deegaanka.

positiveExamples.english: A printer is a machine that produces paper copies.
positiveExamples.somali: Daabace waa mashiin sameeya nuqullo waraaq ah.

positiveExamples.english: A teacher is someone who helps students understand new ideas.
positiveExamples.somali: Macallin waa qof ardayda ka caawiya inay fahmaan fikrado cusub.

positiveExamples.english: A mechanic is a person who repairs vehicles in a garage.
positiveExamples.somali: Farsamo-yaqaan baabuur waa qof gaadiidka ku dayactira garaash.

positiveExamples.english: A receptionist is someone who welcomes visitors and answers calls.
positiveExamples.somali: Soo-dhoweeye waa qof booqdayaasha soo dhoweeya kana jawaaba wicitaannada.

positiveExamples.english: A printer is a machine that produces paper copies of documents.
positiveExamples.somali: Daabace waa mashiin sameeya nuqullo waraaq ah oo dukumentiyada ah.

positiveExamples.english: A warehouse is a building that stores products before delivery.
positiveExamples.somali: Bakhaar waa dhisme kaydiya alaabta ka hor gaarsiinta.

positiveExamples.english: A uniform is special clothing that employees wear at work.
positiveExamples.somali: Direys waa dhar gaar ah oo shaqaaluhu ku xirtaan shaqada.

negativeExamples.english: She does not work at weekends.
The manager is not attending the meeting now.

questionExamples.english: Do you work in a team?
Are they preparing the customer order now?

commonMistakesSomali: Must, mustn’t, can iyo could ka dib isticmaal base verb; ha ku darin to ama s.
Routine-ka u isticmaal Present Simple; hawsha hadda socota u isticmaal Present Continuous.
Mustn’t waa mamnuuc, laakiin don’t have to waa khasab ma aha.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Xirfadaha iyo sifooyinka shaqaalaha waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples shaqo oo dabiici ah, iyo mock workplace data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Xirfadaha iyo sifooyinka shaqaalaha.
Adeegso grammar-ka workplace-ka ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Skill waa awood wax lagu qaban karo; quality waa sifo qofka shaqada ku caawisa. Sharaxaadda waxaa lagu koobay heerka A2 iyo workplace context ammaan ah.
grammar.rule: Skill waa awood wax lagu qaban karo; quality waa sifo qofka shaqada ku caawisa.
grammar.sentenceStructure: Job requires + skill / employee + be + quality.

positiveExamples.english: This position requires employees to communicate while serving customers.
positiveExamples.somali: Booskan shaqo wuxuu shaqaalaha uga baahan yahay inay si cad ula xiriir marka ay macaamiisha u adeegayaan.

positiveExamples.english: This position requires employees to organize while serving customers.

negativeExamples.english: She does not work at weekends.
The manager is not attending the meeting now.

questionExamples.english: Do you work in a team?
Are they preparing the customer order now?

commonMistakesSomali: Must, mustn’t, can iyo could ka dib isticmaal base verb; ha ku darin to ama s.
Routine-ka u isticmaal Present Simple; hawsha hadda socota u isticmaal Present Continuous.
Mustn’t waa mamnuuc, laakiin don’t have to waa khasab ma aha.

dialogues.titleSomali: Xirfadaha iyo sifooyinka shaqaalaha: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary note • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you explain today’s main task?
lines.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa hawsha ugu weyn ee maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: This position requires employees to communicate while serving customers.
lines.somali: Booskan shaqo wuxuu shaqaalaha uga baahan yahay inay si cad ula xiriir marka ay macaamiisha u adeegayaan.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Do we have to finish it before lunch?
lines.somali: Ma khasab baa inaan qadada ka hor dhammaystirno?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, the customer needs it this afternoon.
lines.somali: Haa, macmiilku wuxuu u baahan yahay galabta.

dialogues.titleSomali: Xirfadaha iyo sifooyinka shaqaalaha: wada hadal labaad • grammar note • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: This position requires employees to organize while serving customers.
lines.somali: Booskan shaqo wuxuu shaqaalaha uga baahan yahay inay abaabul marka ay macaamiisha u adeegayaan.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will check the schedule now.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Hadda ayaan jadwalka hubinayaa.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask me if you need help.
lines.somali: Fadlan i weydii haddii aad caawimo u baahan tahay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Certainly. I will send you an update later.
lines.somali: Hubaal. Goor dambe ayaan xog cusub kuu soo diri doonaa.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Ka hadalka waayo-aragnimada shaqo waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples shaqo oo dabiici ah, iyo mock workplace data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Ka hadalka waayo-aragnimada shaqo.
Adeegso grammar-ka workplace-ka ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Past Simple waxaa loo isticmaalaa work experience dhammaaday; Present Perfect halkan laguma baranayo. Sharaxaadda waxaa lagu koobay heerka A2 iyo workplace context ammaan ah.
grammar.rule: Past Simple waxaa loo isticmaalaa work experience dhammaaday; Present Perfect halkan laguma baranayo.

positiveExamples.english: I worked in a clothing shop for six months in 2025.
positiveExamples.somali: Waxaan lix bilood sannadkii 2025 ka shaqeeyay dukaan dhar.

positiveExamples.english: She started her first job at an example hotel in 2024.
positiveExamples.somali: Waxay shaqadeedii koowaad ka bilowday huteel tusaale ah sannadkii 2024.

positiveExamples.english: He helped customers find products during his previous job.
positiveExamples.somali: Wuxuu macaamiisha ka caawiyay helidda alaabta intii uu hayay shaqadiisii hore.

positiveExamples.english: We prepared orders and checked addresses before each delivery.
positiveExamples.somali: Waxaan diyaarinay dalabyada, cinwaannadana waan hubinnay ka hor gaarsiin kasta.

positiveExamples.english: The new staff attended training before they used the system.
positiveExamples.somali: Shaqaalaha cusub waxay ka qaybgaleen tababar ka hor intaysan nidaamka isticmaalin.

positiveExamples.english: They learned the new system during a course last month.
positiveExamples.somali: Waxay nidaamka cusub ku barteen koorso bishii hore.

positiveExamples.english: Last year, I worked part-time as an office assistant.
positiveExamples.somali: Sannadkii hore, waxaan waqti dhiman uga shaqeeyay kaaliye xafiis.

positiveExamples.english: She worked at the clinic for six months in 2025.
positiveExamples.somali: Waxay rugta caafimaadka ka shaqaysay lix bilood sannadkii 2025.

negativeExamples.english: She does not work at weekends.
The manager is not attending the meeting now.

questionExamples.english: Do you work in a team?
Are they preparing the customer order now?

commonMistakesSomali: Must, mustn’t, can iyo could ka dib isticmaal base verb; ha ku darin to ama s.
Routine-ka u isticmaal Present Simple; hawsha hadda socota u isticmaal Present Continuous.
Mustn’t waa mamnuuc, laakiin don’t have to waa khasab ma aha.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Fahamka xayeysiiska shaqo waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples shaqo oo dabiici ah, iyo mock workplace data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Fahamka xayeysiiska shaqo.
Adeegso grammar-ka workplace-ka ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Job advertisement-ku wuxuu sharxaa title, duties, hours, skills iyo application method. Sharaxaadda waxaa lagu koobay heerka A2 iyo workplace context ammaan ah.
grammar.rule: Job advertisement-ku wuxuu sharxaa title, duties, hours, skills iyo application method.

commonMistakesSomali: Must, mustn’t, can iyo could ka dib isticmaal base verb; ha ku darin to ama s.
Routine-ka u isticmaal Present Simple; hawsha hadda socota u isticmaal Present Continuous.
Mustn’t waa mamnuuc, laakiin don’t have to waa khasab ma aha.

examples.english: SHOP ASSISTANT — Example Clothing Store — Help customers, organize products, and check sizes. Part-time, 08:00–13:00, Sunday to Thursday. Friendly communication required; experience is helpful but not required. Apply with a short mock message before 30 July 2026.
examples.somali: KAALIYE DUKAAN — Dukaan Dhar Tusaale ah — Caawi macaamiisha, habee alaabta, hubina cabbirrada. Waqti dhiman 08:00–13:00, Axad ilaa Khamiis. Xiriir wanaagsan ayaa loo baahan yahay; waayo-aragnimadu waa faa’iido laakiin khasab ma aha. Ku codso fariin tusaale ah ka hor 30 Luulyo 2026.

examples.english: RECEPTIONIST — Example City Hotel — Welcome visitors, answer calls, and arrange appointments. Full-time, 07:00–15:00, five days a week. Polite English and basic computer skills required. Send a mock CV before 2 August 2026.
examples.somali: SOO-DHOWEEYE — Huteel Magaalo Tusaale ah — Soo dhowee booqdayaasha, ka jawaab wicitaannada, qabana ballamaha. Waqti buuxa 07:00–15:00, shan maalmood toddobaadkii. English edeb leh iyo xirfado kombiyuutar oo aasaasi ah ayaa loo baahan yahay. Dir CV tusaale ah ka hor 2 Agoosto 2026.

examples.english: DELIVERY DRIVER — Example Delivery Service — Check packages, follow the daily route, and call customers before delivery. Full-time, 09:00–17:00. A driving skill and careful work are required; six months of example experience preferred. Apply through a mock form by 5 August 2026.
examples.somali: DARAWAL GAARSIIN — Adeeg Gaarsiin Tusaale ah — Hubi xirmooyinka, raac jidka maalinlaha ah, wacna macaamiisha ka hor gaarsiinta. Waqti buuxa 09:00–17:00. Wadista iyo taxaddarka ayaa loo baahan yahay; lix bilood oo waayo-aragnimo tusaale ah waa la doorbidayaa. Ku codso foom tusaale ah 5 Agoosto 2026.

examples.english: OFFICE ASSISTANT — Example Learning Centre — Prepare documents, organize files, and support meetings. Part-time, 08:30–14:30, Monday to Wednesday. Clear writing and computer skills required; no previous experience required. Email a mock application before 8 August 2026.
examples.somali: KAALIYE XAFIIS — Xarun Waxbarasho Tusaale ah — Diyaari dukumentiyo, habee faylal, taageerna shirarka. Waqti dhiman 08:30–14:30, Isniin ilaa Arbaco. Qoraal cad iyo kombiyuutar ayaa loo baahan yahay; waayo-aragnimo hore khasab ma aha. Dir codsi iimayl tusaale ah ka hor 8 Agoosto 2026.

examples.english: HOTEL WORKER — Example Coast Hotel — Prepare rooms, help guests, and report problems to the manager. Evening shift, 14:00–22:00, four days a week. Teamwork and reliability required; training is provided. Apply with a mock CV by 10 August 2026.
examples.somali: SHAQAALE HUTEEL — Huteel Xeeb Tusaale ah — Diyaari qolalka, caawi martida, dhibaatooyinkana u sheeg maamulaha. Wareeg fiid 14:00–22:00, afar maalmood toddobaadkii. Koox-wada-shaqayn iyo kalsooni ayaa loo baahan yahay; tababar waa la bixinayaa. Ku codso CV tusaale ah 10 Agoosto 2026.

dialogues.titleSomali: Fahamka xayeysiiska shaqo: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary note • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you explain today’s main task?
lines.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa hawsha ugu weyn ee maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The job advertisement explains the duties, hours, and application method.
lines.somali: Xayeysiiska shaqadu wuxuu sharxayaa waajibaadka, saacadaha iyo habka codsiga.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Do we have to finish it before lunch?
lines.somali: Ma khasab baa inaan qadada ka hor dhammaystirno?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, the customer needs it this afternoon.
lines.somali: Haa, macmiilku wuxuu u baahan yahay galabta.

dialogues.titleSomali: Fahamka xayeysiiska shaqo: wada hadal labaad • grammar note • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The mock job advertisement clearly lists the job title for every applicant.
lines.somali: Xayeysiiska shaqo ee tusaalaha ahi wuxuu si cad u qoraa magaca shaqada codsade kasta.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will check the schedule now.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Hadda ayaan jadwalka hubinayaa.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask me if you need help.
lines.somali: Fadlan i weydii haddii aad caawimo u baahan tahay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Certainly. I will send you an update later.
lines.somali: Hubaal. Goor dambe ayaan xog cusub kuu soo diri doonaa.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan Fahamka xayeysiiska shaqo. Isticmaal qof, shaqo iyo workplace tusaale ah; ha bixin xog shaqsiyeed dhab ah.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor 6 ilaa 10 jumladood ama workplace message ku saabsan Fahamka xayeysiiska shaqo, adigoo adeegsanaya xog mock ah.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad baratay Fahamka xayeysiiska shaqo, vocabulary muhiim ah, grammar-ka A2 iyo sida workplace context loogu isticmaalo.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: CV-ga iyo xogta xirfadeed waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples shaqo oo dabiici ah, iyo mock workplace data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga CV-ga iyo xogta xirfadeed.
Adeegso grammar-ka workplace-ka ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: CV and Personal Profile Vocabulary grammar
grammar.explanationSomali: CV-gu wuxuu leeyahay profile, education, experience, skills iyo contact information. Sharaxaadda waxaa lagu koobay heerka A2 iyo workplace context ammaan ah.
grammar.rule: CV-gu wuxuu leeyahay profile, education, experience, skills iyo contact information.

positiveExamples.somali: Waayo-aragnimadayda shaqo waxaa ku jira lix bilood oo adeegga macaamiisha ah.

negativeExamples.english: She does not work at weekends.
The manager is not attending the meeting now.

questionExamples.english: Do you work in a team?
Are they preparing the customer order now?

commonMistakesSomali: Must, mustn’t, can iyo could ka dib isticmaal base verb; ha ku darin to ama s.
Routine-ka u isticmaal Present Simple; hawsha hadda socota u isticmaal Present Continuous.
Mustn’t waa mamnuuc, laakiin don’t have to waa khasab ma aha.

examples.english: I am a reliable and organized office assistant. I can use common computer programs and communicate with customers in Somali and English. I work well in a team and learn new tasks quickly.

dialogues.titleSomali: CV-ga iyo xogta xirfadeed: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary note • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you explain today’s main task?
lines.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa hawsha ugu weyn ee maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The applicant placed the cv in the correct section of the example CV.
lines.somali: Codsaduhu wuxuu taariikh-nololeed shaqo geliyay qaybta saxda ah ee CV-ga tusaalaha ah.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Do we have to finish it before lunch?
lines.somali: Ma khasab baa inaan qadada ka hor dhammaystirno?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, the customer needs it this afternoon.
lines.somali: Haa, macmiilku wuxuu u baahan yahay galabta.

dialogues.titleSomali: CV-ga iyo xogta xirfadeed: wada hadal labaad • grammar note • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The applicant placed the résumé in the correct section of the example CV.
lines.somali: Codsaduhu wuxuu CV geliyay qaybta saxda ah ee CV-ga tusaalaha ah.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will check the schedule now.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Hadda ayaan jadwalka hubinayaa.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask me if you need help.
lines.somali: Fadlan i weydii haddii aad caawimo u baahan tahay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Certainly. I will send you an update later.
lines.somali: Hubaal. Goor dambe ayaan xog cusub kuu soo diri doonaa.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan CV-ga iyo xogta xirfadeed. Isticmaal qof, shaqo iyo workplace tusaale ah; ha bixin xog shaqsiyeed dhab ah.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor 6 ilaa 10 jumladood ama workplace message ku saabsan CV-ga iyo xogta xirfadeed, adigoo adeegsanaya xog mock ah.
lessons.summarySomali: Waxaad baratay CV-ga iyo xogta xirfadeed, vocabulary muhiim ah, grammar-ka A2 iyo sida workplace context loogu isticmaalo.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Qorista fariin codsi shaqo waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples shaqo oo dabiici ah, iyo mock workplace data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Qorista fariin codsi shaqo.
Adeegso grammar-ka workplace-ka ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: Writing a Job Application Message grammar
grammar.explanationSomali: Application-ku wuxuu leeyahay greeting, position, skills, experience, request iyo polite ending. Sharaxaadda waxaa lagu koobay heerka A2 iyo workplace context ammaan ah.
grammar.rule: Application-ku wuxuu leeyahay greeting, position, skills, experience, request iyo polite ending.

positiveExamples.english: The application begins with “Dear Hiring Manager” as a polite greeting.
positiveExamples.somali: Codsigu wuxuu ku bilaabmaa “Maamule shaqaaleysiin qaali ah” oo ah salaan edeb leh.

positiveExamples.english: I am writing to apply for the receptionist position.
positiveExamples.somali: Waxaan qorayaa inaan codsado booska soo-dhoweeyaha.

positiveExamples.english: The applicant clearly names the shop-assistant position in the first paragraph.
positiveExamples.somali: Codsaduhu wuxuu sadarka koowaad si cad ugu magacaabay booska kaaliyaha dukaanka.

positiveExamples.english: I have experience helping customers and organizing products.
positiveExamples.somali: Waxaan waayo-aragnimo u leeyahay caawinta macaamiisha iyo habaynta alaabta.

positiveExamples.english: The applicant is reliable and completes every task on time.
positiveExamples.somali: Codsaduhu waa qof lagu kalsoonaan karo, hawl kastana waqtigeeda ayuu dhammaystiraa.

positiveExamples.english: I am available full-time and can start next Monday.
positiveExamples.somali: Waxaan diyaar u ahay waqti buuxa, waxaanan bilaabi karaa Isniinta dambe.

positiveExamples.english: Please find my mock CV attached to this application email.
positiveExamples.somali: Fadlan eeg CV-gayga tusaalaha ah ee ku lifaaqan iimaylkan codsiga.

positiveExamples.english: I would be happy to attend an interview next week.
positiveExamples.somali: Waan ku farxi lahaa inaan wareysi ka qayb galo toddobaadka dambe.

negativeExamples.english: She does not work at weekends.
The manager is not attending the meeting now.

questionExamples.english: Do you work in a team?
Are they preparing the customer order now?

commonMistakesSomali: Must, mustn’t, can iyo could ka dib isticmaal base verb; ha ku darin to ama s.
Routine-ka u isticmaal Present Simple; hawsha hadda socota u isticmaal Present Continuous.
Mustn’t waa mamnuuc, laakiin don’t have to waa khasab ma aha.

examples.somali: Waxaan waayo-aragnimo u leeyahay caawinta macaamiisha iyo habaynta alaabta.

examples.english: The applicant is reliable and completes every task on time.
examples.somali: Codsaduhu waa qof lagu kalsoonaan karo, hawl kastana waqtigeeda ayuu dhammaystiraa.

examples.english: I am available full-time and can start next Monday.
examples.somali: Waxaan diyaar u ahay waqti buuxa, waxaanan bilaabi karaa Isniinta dambe.

examples.english: I would be happy to attend an interview next week.
examples.somali: Waan ku farxi lahaa inaan wareysi ka qayb galo toddobaadka dambe.

examples.english: Dear Hiring Manager, I am writing to apply for the shop-assistant position. I have experience helping customers and organizing products. I am friendly, reliable, and available to work full-time. Please find my mock CV attached. I would be happy to attend an interview. Kind regards, Ali.
examples.somali: Maamule shaqaaleysiin qaali ah, waxaan qorayaa inaan codsado booska kaaliyaha dukaanka. Waxaan waayo-aragnimo u leeyahay caawinta macaamiisha iyo habaynta alaabta. Waxaan ahay qof saaxiibtinimo leh oo lagu kalsoonaan karo, waqti buuxana diyaar u ah. Fadlan eeg CV-gayga tusaalaha ah ee lifaaqan. Waan ku farxi lahaa inaan wareysi ka qayb galo. Salaan wanaagsan, Cali.

dialogues.titleSomali: Qorista fariin codsi shaqo: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary note • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you explain today’s main task?
lines.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa hawsha ugu weyn ee maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The application begins with “Dear Hiring Manager” as a polite greeting.
lines.somali: Codsigu wuxuu ku bilaabmaa “Maamule shaqaaleysiin qaali ah” oo ah salaan edeb leh.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Do we have to finish it before lunch?
lines.somali: Ma khasab baa inaan qadada ka hor dhammaystirno?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, the customer needs it this afternoon.
lines.somali: Haa, macmiilku wuxuu u baahan yahay galabta.

dialogues.titleSomali: Qorista fariin codsi shaqo: wada hadal labaad • grammar note • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I am writing to apply for the receptionist position.
lines.somali: Waxaan qorayaa inaan codsado booska soo-dhoweeyaha.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will check the schedule now.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Hadda ayaan jadwalka hubinayaa.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask me if you need help.
lines.somali: Fadlan i weydii haddii aad caawimo u baahan tahay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Certainly. I will send you an update later.
lines.somali: Hubaal. Goor dambe ayaan xog cusub kuu soo diri doonaa.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Wareysiga shaqada waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples shaqo oo dabiici ah, iyo mock workplace data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Wareysiga shaqada.
Adeegso grammar-ka workplace-ka ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.

commonMistakesSomali: Must, mustn’t, can iyo could ka dib isticmaal base verb; ha ku darin to ama s.
Routine-ka u isticmaal Present Simple; hawsha hadda socota u isticmaal Present Continuous.
Mustn’t waa mamnuuc, laakiin don’t have to waa khasab ma aha.

dialogues.titleSomali: Wareysiga shaqada: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary note • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you explain today’s main task?
lines.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa hawsha ugu weyn ee maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: During a workplace conversation, Asha asked, “Can you tell me about yourself?”.
lines.somali: Intii lagu jiray wada hadal shaqo, Caasha waxay weydiisay, “Wax yar ma iga sheegi kartaa naftaada?”.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Do we have to finish it before lunch?
lines.somali: Ma khasab baa inaan qadada ka hor dhammaystirno?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, the customer needs it this afternoon.
lines.somali: Haa, macmiilku wuxuu u baahan yahay galabta.

dialogues.titleSomali: Wareysiga shaqada: wada hadal labaad • grammar note • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: During a workplace conversation, Asha asked, “Why do you want this job?”.
lines.somali: Intii lagu jiray wada hadal shaqo, Caasha waxay weydiisay, “Maxaad shaqadan u doonaysaa?”.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will check the schedule now.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Hadda ayaan jadwalka hubinayaa.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask me if you need help.
lines.somali: Fadlan i weydii haddii aad caawimo u baahan tahay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Certainly. I will send you an update later.
lines.somali: Hubaal. Goor dambe ayaan xog cusub kuu soo diri doonaa.

grammar.explanationSomali: Dhibaatada si cad u sheeg, kadib codso ama soo jeedi xal ammaan ah. Sharaxaadda waxaa lagu koobay heerka A2 iyo workplace context ammaan ah.
grammar.rule: Dhibaatada si cad u sheeg, kadib codso ama soo jeedi xal ammaan ah.

commonMistakesSomali: Must, mustn’t, can iyo could ka dib isticmaal base verb; ha ku darin to ama s.
Routine-ka u isticmaal Present Simple; hawsha hadda socota u isticmaal Present Continuous.
Mustn’t waa mamnuuc, laakiin don’t have to waa khasab ma aha.

dialogues.titleSomali: Dhibaatooyinka goobta shaqada: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary note • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you explain today’s main task?
lines.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa hawsha ugu weyn ee maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The office computer is not working, so I cannot open the customer file.
lines.somali: Kombiyuutarka xafiisku ma shaqaynayo, sidaas darteed ma furi karo faylka macmiilka.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Do we have to finish it before lunch?
lines.somali: Ma khasab baa inaan qadada ka hor dhammaystirno?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, the customer needs it this afternoon.
lines.somali: Haa, macmiilku wuxuu u baahan yahay galabta.

dialogues.titleSomali: Dhibaatooyinka goobta shaqada: wada hadal labaad • grammar note • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The printer has no paper, so the forms are waiting.
lines.somali: Daabacuhu waraaq ma leh, sidaas darteed foomamku way sugayaan.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will check the schedule now.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Hadda ayaan jadwalka hubinayaa.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask me if you need help.
lines.somali: Fadlan i weydii haddii aad caawimo u baahan tahay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Certainly. I will send you an update later.
lines.somali: Hubaal. Goor dambe ayaan xog cusub kuu soo diri doonaa.

lessons.titleEnglish: Writing a Workplace Email or Message
lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Qorista email ama fariin shaqo waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples shaqo oo dabiici ah, iyo mock workplace data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Qorista email ama fariin shaqo.
Adeegso grammar-ka workplace-ka ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.

vocabulary.partOfSpeech: workplace word or phrase • Writing a Workplace Email or Message • neutral
vocabulary.exampleEnglish: The email subject “Printer problem” tells the reader what the message is about.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Topic: Qorista email ama fariin shaqo. Common collocation-ka waxaa lagu muujiyay jumladda shaqada ee dabiiciga ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha u turjumin eray-eray haddii qaabka English-ku ka duwan yahay Af-Soomaaliga.

grammar.titleEnglish: Writing a Workplace Email or Message grammar
grammar.titleSomali: Naxwaha Qorista email ama fariin shaqo
grammar.explanationSomali: Work email-ku wuxuu leeyahay subject cad, reason, detail, requested action iyo closing. Sharaxaadda waxaa lagu koobay heerka A2 iyo workplace context ammaan ah.
grammar.rule: Work email-ku wuxuu leeyahay subject cad, reason, detail, requested action iyo closing.

positiveExamples.english: The email subject “Printer problem” tells the reader what the message is about.
positiveExamples.somali: Cinwaanka iimaylka ee “Dhibaatada daabacaha” wuxuu akhristaha tusayaa waxa fariintu ku saabsan tahay.

positiveExamples.english: The workplace email begins with a polite greeting to the colleague.
positiveExamples.somali: Iimaylka shaqadu wuxuu ku bilaabmaa salaan edeb leh oo loo dirayo shaqaalaha kale.

positiveExamples.english: The first sentence gives the reason for the workplace message.
positiveExamples.somali: Jumladda koowaad waxay sheegaysaa sababta fariinta shaqada.

positiveExamples.english: The important detail explains that three customer forms are waiting.
positiveExamples.somali: Faahfaahinta muhiimka ahi waxay sharxaysaa in saddex foom oo macmiil ay sugayaan.

positiveExamples.english: The requested action asks the technician to check the printer this morning.
positiveExamples.somali: Tallaabada la codsaday waxay farsamo-yaqaanka ka dalbanaysaa inuu saaka hubiyo daabacaha.

positiveExamples.english: The writer uses a polite closing before adding the example name.
positiveExamples.somali: Qoraagu wuxuu adeegsadaa gunaanad edeb leh ka hor magaca tusaalaha ah.

positiveExamples.english: I am writing to ask for information about Friday’s work schedule.
positiveExamples.somali: Waxaan qorayaa inaan codsado macluumaad ku saabsan jadwalka shaqada ee Jimcaha.

positiveExamples.english: The employee uses email to report a problem with the main printer.
positiveExamples.somali: Shaqaaluhu wuxuu iimayl u adeegsadaa inuu soo sheego dhibaato daabacaha weyn.

negativeExamples.english: She does not work at weekends.
The manager is not attending the meeting now.

questionExamples.english: Do you work in a team?
Are they preparing the customer order now?

commonMistakesSomali: Must, mustn’t, can iyo could ka dib isticmaal base verb; ha ku darin to ama s.
Routine-ka u isticmaal Present Simple; hawsha hadda socota u isticmaal Present Continuous.
Mustn’t waa mamnuuc, laakiin don’t have to waa khasab ma aha.

examples.english: Subject: Printer problem. Hello Fatima, the printer in the main office is not working, so I cannot print the customer forms. Could you please ask the technician to check it this morning? Thank you, Ahmed.
examples.somali: Mawduuc: Dhibaatada daabacaha. Salaan Faadumo, daabacaha xafiiska weyn ma shaqaynayo, sidaas darteed ma daabici karo foomamka macaamiisha. Fadlan farsamo-yaqaanka ma ka codsan kartaa inuu saaka hubiyo? Mahadsanid, Axmed.

dialogues.titleSomali: Qorista email ama fariin shaqo: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary note • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you explain today’s main task?
lines.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa hawsha ugu weyn ee maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The email subject “Printer problem” tells the reader what the message is about.
lines.somali: Cinwaanka iimaylka ee “Dhibaatada daabacaha” wuxuu akhristaha tusayaa waxa fariintu ku saabsan tahay.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Do we have to finish it before lunch?
lines.somali: Ma khasab baa inaan qadada ka hor dhammaystirno?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, the customer needs it this afternoon.
lines.somali: Haa, macmiilku wuxuu u baahan yahay galabta.

dialogues.titleSomali: Qorista email ama fariin shaqo: wada hadal labaad • grammar note • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The workplace email begins with a polite greeting to the colleague.
lines.somali: Iimaylka shaqadu wuxuu ku bilaabmaa salaan edeb leh oo loo dirayo shaqaalaha kale.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will check the schedule now.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Hadda ayaan jadwalka hubinayaa.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask me if you need help.
lines.somali: Fadlan i weydii haddii aad caawimo u baahan tahay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Certainly. I will send you an update later.
lines.somali: Hubaal. Goor dambe ayaan xog cusub kuu soo diri doonaa.

grammar.explanationSomali: Reading-ku wuxuu kala saaraa main idea, details, sequence, rule, request iyo information. Sharaxaadda waxaa lagu koobay heerka A2 iyo workplace context ammaan ah.
grammar.rule: Reading-ku wuxuu kala saaraa main idea, details, sequence, rule, request iyo information.

commonMistakesSomali: Must, mustn’t, can iyo could ka dib isticmaal base verb; ha ku darin to ama s.
Routine-ka u isticmaal Present Simple; hawsha hadda socota u isticmaal Present Continuous.
Mustn’t waa mamnuuc, laakiin don’t have to waa khasab ma aha.

examples.english:
Subject: Thursday schedule and customer orders

Hello team,

Thursday will be a busy day at our example office. The morning shift starts at eight o’clock, but new employees should arrive fifteen minutes early. First, Amina will open the customer-service desk and check the appointment list. Yusuf will prepare the meeting room and place the printed reports on the table. At nine, the manager will explain the new delivery schedule to everyone.

After the meeting, please check every customer order before putting it in the delivery area. Two orders have different addresses, so do not place them in the same box. If you cannot find a document, ask the office assistant for help. Staff must wear name badges inside the building, but they do not have to wear jackets at their desks.

The printer in the main office is not working today. Could you send urgent documents to the second-floor printer instead? A technician is coming at eleven to check the problem. Lunch break begins at one and lasts thirty minutes. The afternoon team will finish at five. Before leaving, return all files to the correct folders and send the manager a short message confirming that the orders are ready.

Thank you for your careful work.
examples.somali: Mawduuc: Jadwalka Khamiista iyo dalabyada macaamiisha. Fariintu waxay kooxda u sharxaysaa wakhtiga ay imanayaan, hawlaha subaxda, shirka, hubinta dalabyada, xeerarka magaca, dhibaatada daabacaha, nasashada qadada iyo waxa la qabanayo ka hor bixitaanka. Dhammaan magacyada iyo xogtu waa tusaale.

dialogues.titleSomali: Akhrinta fariin shaqo: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary note • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you explain today’s main task?
lines.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa hawsha ugu weyn ee maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The main idea is that Thursday has a busy schedule and several customer orders.
lines.somali: Fikradda guud waa in Khamiistu leedahay jadwal mashquul ah iyo dalabyo badan oo macaamiil.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Do we have to finish it before lunch?
lines.somali: Ma khasab baa inaan qadada ka hor dhammaystirno?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, the customer needs it this afternoon.
lines.somali: Haa, macmiilku wuxuu u baahan yahay galabta.

dialogues.titleSomali: Akhrinta fariin shaqo: wada hadal labaad • grammar note • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The work schedule shows each employee’s shift, break, and working hours.
lines.somali: Jadwalka shaqadu wuxuu muujinayaa wareegga, nasashada iyo saacadaha shaqaale kasta.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will check the schedule now.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Hadda ayaan jadwalka hubinayaa.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask me if you need help.
lines.somali: Fadlan i weydii haddii aad caawimo u baahan tahay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Certainly. I will send you an update later.
lines.somali: Hubaal. Goor dambe ayaan xog cusub kuu soo diri doonaa.
