grammar.explanationSomali: Conversation-ku wuxuu isku daraa vocabulary iyo grammar-ka Unit 6. Sharaxaadda waxaa lagu koobay heerka A2 iyo workplace context ammaan ah.
grammar.rule: Conversation-ku wuxuu isku daraa vocabulary iyo grammar-ka Unit 6.

positiveExamples.english: Two new colleagues ask about a job and compare their daily duties.
positiveExamples.somali: Laba shaqaale oo cusub ayaa shaqo wax ka weydiinaya, waajibaadkoodana isbarbardhigaya.

positiveExamples.english: The shop assistant speaks to a customer about an incorrect order.
positiveExamples.somali: Kaaliyaha dukaanku wuxuu macmiil kala hadlayaa dalab khaldan.

positiveExamples.english: Could you ask a colleague for help with these customer files?
positiveExamples.somali: Ma shaqaalaha kula shaqeeya ayaad caawimo ka weydiin kartaa faylashan macaamiisha?

positiveExamples.english: The new employee listens carefully to receive instructions for the morning task.
positiveExamples.somali: Shaqaalaha cusubi si taxaddar leh ayuu u dhagaystaa si uu u qaato tilmaamaha hawsha subax.

positiveExamples.english: The employee uses email to report a problem with the main printer.
positiveExamples.somali: Shaqaaluhu wuxuu iimayl u adeegsadaa inuu soo sheego dhibaato daabacaha weyn.

positiveExamples.english: The manager and employee discuss a schedule before changing Friday’s shift.
positiveExamples.somali: Maamulaha iyo shaqaaluhu waxay ka wada hadlaan jadwal ka hor beddelidda wareegga Jimcaha.

positiveExamples.english: The applicant reads the duties carefully before applying for a job.
positiveExamples.somali: Codsaduhu wuxuu si taxaddar leh u akhriyaa waajibaadka ka hor codsiga shaqada.

positiveExamples.english: The mock job interview asks about skills, experience, and availability.
positiveExamples.somali: Wareysiga shaqo ee tusaalaha ahi wuxuu wax ka weydiinayaa xirfado, waayo-aragnimo iyo diyaar ahaansho.

negativeExamples.english: She does not work at weekends.
The manager is not attending the meeting now.

questionExamples.english: Do you work in a team?
Are they preparing the customer order now?

commonMistakesSomali: Must, mustn’t, can iyo could ka dib isticmaal base verb; ha ku darin to ama s.
Routine-ka u isticmaal Present Simple; hawsha hadda socota u isticmaal Present Continuous.
Mustn’t waa mamnuuc, laakiin don’t have to waa khasab ma aha.

practiceQuestions.question: Dooro macnaha shaqo ee saxda ah: “Ask about a job”.
practiceQuestions.correctAnswer: shaqo wax ka weydii
practiceQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “shaqo wax ka weydii”. Source: Wada sheekeysiyada goobta shaqada. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharka iyo tusaalihiisa shaqo.

practiceQuestions.question: English u dooro: Ma shaqaalaha kula shaqeeya ayaad caawimo ka weydiin kartaa faylashan macaamiisha?
options: Could you ask a colleague for help with these customer files?

She works as the sales department.

dialogues.titleSomali: asking about someone’s job • vocabulary notes • grammar note • 2 comprehension questions • missing-line • best-response • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Good morning. Do you have a moment?
lines.somali: Subax wanaagsan. Waqti yar ma haysaa?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, of course. How can I help?
lines.somali: Haa, dabcan. Sideen kuu caawin karaa?

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I work as an office assistant at a learning centre.
lines.somali: Waxaan kaaliye xafiis uga shaqeeyaa xarun waxbarasho.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you for explaining that clearly.
lines.somali: Waad ku mahadsan tahay sharaxaadda cad.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you check the details with me?
lines.somali: Faahfaahinta ma ila hubin kartaa?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Certainly. Let us start with the schedule.
lines.somali: Hubaal. Aan ku bilowno jadwalka.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Do we have to finish before lunch?
lines.somali: Ma khasab baa inaan qadada ka hor dhammaystirno?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, but we can ask the team for help.
lines.somali: Haa, laakiin kooxda ayaan caawimo weydiisan karnaa.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: I am preparing the first document now.
lines.somali: Hadda waxaan diyaarinayaa dukumentiga koowaad.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Good. I will organize the remaining files.
lines.somali: Wanaagsan. Waxaan habaynayaa faylasha haray.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please send me a message when you finish.
lines.somali: Fadlan fariin ii soo dir markaad dhammayso.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: No problem. I will update you before noon.
lines.somali: Dhib ma leh. Duhur ka hor ayaan kula socodsiinayaa.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Khaladaadka caadiga ah waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples shaqo oo dabiici ah, iyo mock workplace data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Khaladaadka caadiga ah.
Adeegso grammar-ka workplace-ka ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Casharku wuxuu saxayaa work as, third-person s, routine, modal + base iyo experience uncountable. Sharaxaadda waxaa lagu koobay heerka A2 iyo workplace context ammaan ah.
grammar.rule: Casharku wuxuu saxayaa work as, third-person s, routine, modal + base iyo experience uncountable.

positiveExamples.english: I work as a receptionist at an example city hotel.
positiveExamples.somali: Waxaan soo-dhoweeye uga shaqeeyaa huteel magaalo oo tusaale ah.

positiveExamples.english: She works in a bank and helps customers with payment records.
positiveExamples.somali: Waxay ka shaqaysaa bangi, macaamiishana waxay ka caawisaa diiwaannada lacagaha.

positiveExamples.english: I work in an office where the team prepares customer documents.
positiveExamples.somali: Waxaan ka shaqeeyaa xafiis ay kooxdu ku diyaariso dukumentiyada macaamiisha.

positiveExamples.english: I work here every day, but I am attending training today.
positiveExamples.somali: Maalin kasta halkan ayaan ka shaqeeyaa, laakiin maanta tababar ayaan ka qaybgalayaa.

positiveExamples.english: Every visitor must wear an ID card inside the staff area.
positiveExamples.somali: Booqde kasta waa inuu kaarka aqoonsiga ku xirtaa qaybta shaqaalaha.

positiveExamples.english: Visitors mustn’t enter the storage room without permission.
positiveExamples.somali: Booqdayaashu ma geli karaan qolka kaydka oggolaansho la’aan.

positiveExamples.english: You don’t have to enter the meeting room if the session is optional.
positiveExamples.somali: Khasab kuguma aha inaad gasho qolka shirka haddii kulanku ikhtiyaari yahay.

positiveExamples.english: I have experience helping customers and organizing products.
positiveExamples.somali: Waxaan waayo-aragnimo u leeyahay caawinta macaamiisha iyo habaynta alaabta.

negativeExamples.english: She does not work at weekends.
The manager is not attending the meeting now.

questionExamples.english: Do you work in a team?
Are they preparing the customer order now?

commonMistakesSomali: Must, mustn’t, can iyo could ka dib isticmaal base verb; ha ku darin to ama s.
Routine-ka u isticmaal Present Simple; hawsha hadda socota u isticmaal Present Continuous.
Mustn’t waa mamnuuc, laakiin don’t have to waa khasab ma aha.

dialogues.titleSomali: Khaladaadka caadiga ah: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary note • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you explain today’s main task?
lines.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa hawsha ugu weyn ee maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: I work as a receptionist at an example city hotel.
lines.somali: Waxaan soo-dhoweeye uga shaqeeyaa huteel magaalo oo tusaale ah.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Do we have to finish it before lunch?
lines.somali: Ma khasab baa inaan qadada ka hor dhammaystirno?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, the customer needs it this afternoon.
lines.somali: Haa, macmiilku wuxuu u baahan yahay galabta.

dialogues.titleSomali: Khaladaadka caadiga ah: wada hadal labaad • grammar note • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: She works in a bank and helps customers with payment records.
lines.somali: Waxay ka shaqaysaa bangi, macaamiishana waxay ka caawisaa diiwaannada lacagaha.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will check the schedule now.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Hadda ayaan jadwalka hubinayaa.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask me if you need help.
lines.somali: Fadlan i weydii haddii aad caawimo u baahan tahay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Certainly. I will send you an update later.
lines.somali: Hubaal. Goor dambe ayaan xog cusub kuu soo diri doonaa.

quizQuestions.question: Dooro macnaha shaqo ee saxda ah: “Work as”.
quizQuestions.correctAnswer: u shaqee sida
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “u shaqee sida”. Source: Khaladaadka caadiga ah. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharka iyo tusaalihiisa shaqo.

quizQuestions.question: Turjun: She works in a bank and helps customers with payment records.
options: Waxay ka shaqaysaa bangi, macaamiishana waxay ka caawisaa diiwaannada lacagaha.
quizQuestions.correctAnswer: Waxay ka shaqaysaa bangi, macaamiishana waxay ka caawisaa diiwaannada lacagaha.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “Waxay ka shaqaysaa bangi, macaamiishana waxay ka caawisaa diiwaannada lacagaha.”. Source: Khaladaadka caadiga ah. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharka iyo tusaalihiisa shaqo.

quizQuestions.question: English u dooro: Waxaan ka shaqeeyaa xafiis ay kooxdu ku diyaariso dukumentiyada macaamiisha.
options: I work in an office where the team prepares customer documents.
quizQuestions.correctAnswer: I work in an office where the team prepares customer documents.
quizQuestions.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “I work in an office where the team prepares customer documents.”. Source: Khaladaadka caadiga ah. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg casharka iyo tusaalihiisa shaqo.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 6 waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad, examples shaqo oo dabiici ah, iyo mock workplace data.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga Dib-u-eegista Unit 6.
Adeegso grammar-ka workplace-ka ee casharkan.
Samee speaking ama writing task adigoo adeegsanaya xog tusaale ah.

grammar.explanationSomali: Review-gu wuxuu isku daraa dhammaan mawduucyada Unit 6. Sharaxaadda waxaa lagu koobay heerka A2 iyo workplace context ammaan ah.
grammar.rule: Review-gu wuxuu isku daraa dhammaan mawduucyada Unit 6.
grammar.sentenceStructure: Choose the workplace form required by context.

positiveExamples.english: The Unit 6 review uses jobs in a complete workplace situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 6 waxay shaqooyin ku isticmaashaa xaalad shaqo oo dhammaystiran.

positiveExamples.english: The Unit 6 review uses workplaces in a complete workplace situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 6 waxay goobaha shaqada ku isticmaashaa xaalad shaqo oo dhammaystiran.

positiveExamples.english: The Unit 6 review uses responsibilities in a complete workplace situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 6 waxay waajibaad ku isticmaashaa xaalad shaqo oo dhammaystiran.

positiveExamples.english: The Unit 6 review uses schedules in a complete workplace situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 6 waxay jadwallo ku isticmaashaa xaalad shaqo oo dhammaystiran.

positiveExamples.english: The Unit 6 review uses present simple in a complete workplace situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 6 waxay Present Simple ku isticmaashaa xaalad shaqo oo dhammaystiran.

positiveExamples.english: The Unit 6 review uses present continuous in a complete workplace situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 6 waxay Present Continuous ku isticmaashaa xaalad shaqo oo dhammaystiran.

positiveExamples.english: The Unit 6 review uses equipment in a complete workplace situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 6 waxay qalab ku isticmaashaa xaalad shaqo oo dhammaystiran.

positiveExamples.english: The Unit 6 review uses must and mustn’t in a complete workplace situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 6 waxay waajib iyo mamnuuc ku isticmaashaa xaalad shaqo oo dhammaystiran.

negativeExamples.english: She does not work at weekends.
The manager is not attending the meeting now.

questionExamples.english: Do you work in a team?
Are they preparing the customer order now?

commonMistakesSomali: Must, mustn’t, can iyo could ka dib isticmaal base verb; ha ku darin to ama s.
Routine-ka u isticmaal Present Simple; hawsha hadda socota u isticmaal Present Continuous.
Mustn’t waa mamnuuc, laakiin don’t have to waa khasab ma aha.

dialogues.titleSomali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 6: wada hadal koowaad • vocabulary note • comprehension • role-play

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Could you explain today’s main task?
lines.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa hawsha ugu weyn ee maanta?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: The Unit 6 review uses jobs in a complete workplace situation.
lines.somali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 6 waxay shaqooyin ku isticmaashaa xaalad shaqo oo dhammaystiran.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Do we have to finish it before lunch?
lines.somali: Ma khasab baa inaan qadada ka hor dhammaystirno?

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Yes, the customer needs it this afternoon.
lines.somali: Haa, macmiilku wuxuu u baahan yahay galabta.

dialogues.titleSomali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 6: wada hadal labaad • grammar note • missing line • best response

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: The Unit 6 review uses workplaces in a complete workplace situation.
lines.somali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 6 waxay goobaha shaqada ku isticmaashaa xaalad shaqo oo dhammaystiran.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Thank you. I will check the schedule now.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Hadda ayaan jadwalka hubinayaa.

lines.speaker: A
lines.english: Please ask me if you need help.
lines.somali: Fadlan i weydii haddii aad caawimo u baahan tahay.

lines.speaker: B
lines.english: Certainly. I will send you an update later.
lines.somali: Hubaal. Goor dambe ayaan xog cusub kuu soo diri doonaa.
